neo_brutalist.description: Bold, geometric, unapologetic. Technical precision with attitude.

fonts.name: Unbounded
fonts.rationale: Variable geometric sans with distinctive rounded terminals. Strong presence without being corporate.

fonts.name: Bebas Neue
fonts.rationale: Condensed all-caps. Industrial strength, brutalist aesthetic.

fonts.name: Archivo Black
fonts.rationale: Heavy grotesque. Commands attention, brutalist energy.

fonts.name: Work Sans
fonts.rationale: Geometric sans optimized for screens. Pairs well with bold display fonts.

sophisticated_serif.description: Elegant, editorial, refined. Literary quality and timeless appeal.

fonts.name: Playfair Display
fonts.rationale: High-contrast transitional serif. Sophisticated without being stuffy.

fonts.name: Crimson Pro
fonts.rationale: Book-style serif designed for text. Readable elegance.

fonts.name: Cormorant
fonts.rationale: Delicate display serif with Garamond influence. Graceful personality.

fonts.name: Lora
fonts.rationale: Contemporary serif with calligraphic roots. Warmth and character.

fonts.name: Spectral
fonts.rationale: Serif optimized for digital reading. Clear hierarchy.

fonts.name: JetBrains Mono
fonts.rationale: Purpose-built for code. Excellent ligatures, increased letter height.

fonts.name: Fira Code
fonts.rationale: Extension of Fira Mono with programming ligatures. Developer favorite.

fonts.name: IBM Plex Mono
fonts.rationale: Corporate heritage with humanist warmth. Distinctive personality.

fonts.name: Space Mono
fonts.rationale: Geometric monospace with retro-tech feel. Quirky but readable.

warm_humanist.description: Approachable, organic, friendly. Human touch and crafted feel.

fonts.name: Quicksand
fonts.rationale: Rounded geometric sans with friendly personality. Warm without being childish.

fonts.name: Josefin Sans
fonts.rationale: Geometric with vintage poster influence. Distinctive character.

fonts.name: Manrope
fonts.rationale: Modern geometric sans with open apertures. Friendly and functional.

fonts.name: Plus Jakarta Sans
fonts.rationale: Neo-grotesque with Indonesian design influence. Fresh perspective.

retro_display.description: Nostalgic, distinctive, bold. Vintage energy and character.

fonts.name: Righteous
fonts.rationale: Futuristic retro with 80s influence. Strong personality.

fonts.name: Bungee
fonts.rationale: Modular signage typeface. Urban energy and attitude.

fonts.name: Audiowide
fonts.rationale: Techno-futuristic with 80s sci-fi vibe. Synthetic but engaging.

fonts.name: Permanent Marker
fonts.rationale: Handwritten marker aesthetic. Casual energy and immediacy.

editorial_condensed.description: Compact, impactful, magazine-quality. Efficient use of space.

fonts.name: Barlow Condensed
fonts.rationale: Tall grotesque with low contrast. Efficient and striking.

fonts.name: Oswald
fonts.rationale: Gothic condensed with newspaper heritage. Strong vertical emphasis.

fonts.name: Fjalla One
fonts.rationale: Nordic-inspired condensed sans. Sturdy and confident.

geometric_modern.description: Clean, precise, contemporary. Mathematical harmony and balance.

fonts.name: Montserrat
fonts.rationale: Urban geometric inspired by Buenos Aires signage. Clean but characterful.

fonts.name: Poppins
fonts.rationale: Geometric sans with international flair. Rounded but not soft.

fonts.name: DM Sans
fonts.rationale: Low-contrast geometric optimized for UI. Clean efficiency.

pairing_suggestions.rationale: Vintage display character with warm serif body
